tagline: Every automation below is built on real engagement data: story beats generic tips 20-50x.
principle: TRUST → warm the audience with real story · PROOF → show the outcome · HARVEST → the one ask

items.label: pac-content-auto
items.rule: But/Therefore story — ONE real moment, John is protagonist, no tips-listicle.
items.lastOutput: Runs via a Zapier Skill outside this repo — not yet wired to report status here.

items.label: Daily Value Bomb
items.rule: COT format, how-to for filling group classes — real-moment hook + shows the after-state, not just steps.

items.label: lotb-content-auto — carries the story half
items.rule: 7-slide carousel, Slides 1-2 — if the lesson had a real anonymized classroom moment, it carries the claim; parent sees themselves in Slide 2 Mirror.
items.lastOutput: Runs via a Zapier Skill outside this repo — not yet wired to report status here.

items.label: pac-proof-of-work-story
items.rule: 5-slide documentary IG/FB story set — verbatim client quotes, before/after card, one big-number receipt (real or omitted, never invented). Client is the protagonist, not John.
items.destination: "Bot FB/IG stories" Telegram group (review queue — John posts manually)

items.label: lotb-content-auto — carries the outcome half
items.rule: Same Tue/Thu carousel, Slides 3-6 + IG caption — sells the CHILD'S outcome (calm in the exam, marks recovered), never the method alone. Every number shown must be real, from the lesson.
items.destination: "Bot LOB auto content" Telegram group + WhatsApp teasers
items.lastOutput: Runs via a Zapier Skill outside this repo — not yet wired to report status here.

items.label: PS signature (3C / Group GPT)
items.rule: Embedded in every pac-content-auto post — one ask maximum per post. Rotates 3C ↔ Group; content fit overrides rotation.

items.label: SOLVE CTA
items.rule: Embedded in the carousel Slide 7 + IG caption. Qualifying bridge names grade + topic + situation. One CTA only — no follow-me, no save-this.

onDemand.label: draft-fb-post / cot-value-post
onDemand.detail: "draft post about..." — one-off drafts. Same story-first, outcomes-not-process rules as the scheduled streams.

onDemand.label: content-team → quality-reviewer
onDemand.detail: Every FB post draft is reviewed for voice + hook strength before John sees it (max 2 rounds).

onDemand.label: Skool replay pipeline
onDemand.detail: "post pac/lotb skool" — pulls a Fathom call → publishes the matching Skool classroom page → sends a copy-paste Telegram message for WhatsApp.
